---
title: "Louisa Twining"
---

## Louisa Twining

**Dates:** (1820-1912)

### Description

poor law reformer and social worker, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1869-90)

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 11th [1869 [[footnote:2]]]
- Letter from April 26th [1864]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
